title: Full Stack Developer with Emerging Technologies (Blockchain, AI, IoT) and Cloud Expertise
company_focus: Global digital consulting firm for financial services
description:
Job Summary Synechron is seeking an experienced and forward-
thinking Full Stack Developer to spearhead the design,
development, and implementation of innovative technology
solutions using emerging technologies such as blockchain,
IoT, and AI. This leadership role involves guiding cross-
functional teams, mentoring junior developers, and ensuring
project delivery aligns with organizational strategic goals.
The ideal candidate will possess strong technical expertise,
enterprise architecture understanding, and a passion for
leveraging cutting-edge technology to improve business
processes and drive digital transformation.

Software Requirements

- Required:
  - Proficiency in full stack development with a focus on
    emerging technologies such as blockchain, IoT, and AI
  - Deep understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
    and architecture design principles
  - Experience with modern development frameworks and languages
    such as Java, Python, JavaScript, or equivalents
  - Cloud platforms knowledge (AWS, Azure, GCP) for deploying
    and managing scalable solutions
  - Version control systems (Git, GitHub, GitLab)
  - Tools for collaboration and project management (Jira,
    Confluence, MS Teams)

- Preferred:
  - Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker,
    Kubernetes)
  - Frameworks/libraries such as React, Angular, or Vue.js for
    front-end development
  - Data management solutions including NoSQL, data lakes, or
    data warehouses
  - Automation tools (CI/CD pipelines, Jenkins, GitLab CI)

Overall Responsibilities

- Lead the end-to-end development and implementation of
  projects utilizing emerging technologies, ensuring
  seamless integration with existing architectures.
- Mentor and guide team members including developers and
  technical analysts to ensure high-quality project
  delivery.
- Identify and evaluate innovative technology solutions to
  enhance business processes, operational efficiency, and
  product offerings.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align technical
  strategies with organizational objectives.
- Stay current with the latest industry trends, technological
  advancements, and best practices, sharing insights with
  team members and stakeholders.
- Develop and maintain comprehensive technical roadmaps in
  support of strategic growth initiatives.
- Evaluate and select new tools, frameworks, and platforms,
  providing clear recommendations for adoption.
- Manage technical risks, oversee architecture governance, and
  ensure solutions meet security, compliance, and
  scalability standards.

Technical Skills (By Category)

- Programming Languages:
  - Required: Java, Python, JavaScript or TypeScript for full
    stack development
  - Preferred: Other languages such as Golang, R or C++ for
    specialized applications

- Databases & Data Management:
  - Required: Data modeling, NoSQL, data lakes, SQL databases
    (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or equivalent)
  - Preferred: Data warehousing solutions (Snowflake, Redshift)

- Cloud Technologies:
  - Required: Cloud deployment, scaling, and management (AWS,
    Azure, or GCP)
  - Preferred: Cloud native services for AI, IoT, and blockchain
    solutions

- Frameworks & Libraries:
  - Required: Front-end frameworks (React, Angular, or Vue.js),
    AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
  - Preferred: Blockchain development frameworks (Hyperledger,
    Ethereum)

- Development Tools & Methodologies:
  - Required: Git, Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, Agile practices
    (Scrum/Kanban)
  - DevOps integration and automation experience for continuous
    deployment

- Security & Compliance:
  - Knowledge of security standards affecting emerging
    technology solutions, including data privacy and
    regulatory compliance

Experience Requirements

- Minimum of 8 years in full stack development with proven
  leadership in managing technology projects.
- Extensive experience designing and deploying solutions with
  emerging technologies such as blockchain, IoT, or AI.
- Hands-on experience leading cross-functional teams and
  driving technology strategy.
- Familiarity with enterprise architecture and cloud-native
  development.
- Industry experience in banking, finance, or regulated
  sectors is advantageous.
- Alternative pathways include extensive development and
  architecture experience with emerging technologies in
  enterprise environments.

Day-to-Day Activities

- Oversee and direct full stack development projects from
  planning through execution, ensuring compliance with
  quality standards.
- Provide technical mentorship to team members, fostering
  innovation and best practices.
- Evaluate new technologies, propose pilot programs, and drive
  large-scale adoption initiatives.
- Collaborate across teams to solve complex technical
  challenges related to emerging technology integration.
- Develop technical roadmaps, architecture diagrams, and
  documentation aligned with strategic goals.
- Lead technical review sessions, promote automation, and
  implement continuous improvement processes.
- Manage project risks, resolve issues proactively, and report
  progress to senior management.
- Foster a culture of learning, experimentation, and
  innovation within the team.

Qualifications

- Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science,
  Engineering, or a related field.
- Relevant certifications in cloud computing, enterprise
  architecture, or emerging technologies (e.g., AWS, Azure,
  Blockchain, AI/ML) are a plus.
- Proven leadership experience directing complex technology
  projects leveraging emerging technologies.
- Deep knowledge of architecture principles, design patterns,
  and modern development frameworks.
- Strong analytical, strategic thinking, and stakeholder
  engagement skills.

Professional Competencies

- Critical thinking and innovative mindset to identify and
  leverage new technology opportunities.
- Leadership and mentorship skills to develop teams and
  promote knowledge sharing.
- Excellent communication skills for stakeholder management
  and cross-team collaboration.
- Adaptability and continuous learning orientation to stay
  ahead of industry trends.
- Strong organizational skills to manage multiple initiatives
  and prioritize effectively.
- Focus on operational excellence, scalability, security, and
  sustainable innovation.

SYNECHRON’S DIVERSITY & INCLUSION STATEMENT


Diversity & Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and
Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and
is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity,
and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is
committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting
equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to
all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps
build stronger, successful businesses as a global company.
We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds,
race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender,
sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower
our global workforce by offering flexible workplace
arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and
development programs, and more.

All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business
needs, job requirements and individual qualifications,
without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity,
sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran
status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

Candidate Application Notice

Mentor and guide team members including developers and technical analysts to ensure high-quality project delivery
Identify and evaluate innovative technology solutions to enhance business processes, operational efficiency, and product offerings

Develop and maintain comprehensive technical roadmaps in support of strategic growth initiatives
Evaluate and select new tools, frameworks, and platforms, providing clear recommendations for adoption

use_cases: Digital transformation solutions for enterprise clients leveraging emerging technologies
Blockchain-based solutions for banking and financial services
Cloud-native application development for regulated industries
ai_classification_reasoning:
While this role lists AI/ML libraries (TensorFlow, PyTorch)
as required skills and mentions AI as one of several
emerging technologies, the primary focus is full stack
development leadership with broad emerging tech coverage
(blockchain, IoT, AI). AI is one of three technology
pillars, not the central focus. The role is fundamentally a
generalist full stack development leadership position that
works near AI but is not dedicated to building, training, or
deploying AI/ML models as its core function.
